text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since she fell asleep last time and wasn't able to
play, I promise Haru that we'll stop by the park
again on our way back home.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I'm gonna play lots and lots today!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, what should we do first? The curly slide
looks fun...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But the straight slide looks fun, too! Okay, I'll try
that one first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She then scampers off toward the playground.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! It's so fast! Again! Again!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahahahaha! It feels like I'm in a tunnel! Wheee!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee! Haha! This is so fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Are you not gonna join me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Come on! It's super fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! You don't have to hold back around me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh! How about you choose what we try next!
choice_data_list: All right... I choose the swings.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Swings?! Good choice! I love them too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Then, let's compete to see who can swing higher!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: HOOO! HAAAH! I! Won't! Lose!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wuh, huh?! That's it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This swing set would probably snap if an adult
went full force, so I hold back quite a bit.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hehe, looks like today's victory goes to me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But you did good too, Trainer! I could see how
hard you tried! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'll tell you the secret to winning next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She taps her chest reassuringly. As we head home,
I sense just how much she's grown up.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What? Why?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You can still play even if you're not a kid, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Mom and Dad would always go down the slide
with me. It's okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She pulls me to the slide.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Come on! Try it out! It's super-duper fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WHOOOSH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I slide down in the blink of an eye. It feels
surprisingly nostalgic.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow! That was great, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! Here I come! Watch me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I politely decline her other attempts to get me to
play and just watch as she enjoys herself.
